zh.Bawdsey, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可巴
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph de Glanville於大約1045年出生在法國時，他的父親Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville26歲，母親De Thweng27歲。他於大約1065年與Flandrina de Suffolk在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1086年在英國素福爾可艾也享年42歲。

zh-hans.Bawdsey, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可巴
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph de Glanville于大约1045年出生在法国时，他的父亲Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville26岁，母亲De Thweng27岁。他于大约1065年与Flandrina de Suffolk在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1086年在英国素福爾可艾也享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph de Glanville was born about 1045, in France, his father, Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville, was 26 and his mother, De Thweng, was 27. He married Flandrina de Suffolk about 1065, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1086, in Eye, Suffolk, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph de Glanville est né environ 1045, à France, son père, Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, De Thweng, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Flandrina de Suffolk environ 1065, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1086, à Eye, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph de Glanville um 1045 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville 26 und seine Mutter De Thweng 27. Er hat um 1065 in Suffolk, England Flandrina de Suffolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Eye, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Glanville è nato il circa 1045 nel Francia, il suo padre, Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, De Thweng, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Flandrina de Suffolk circa 1065, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1086, nel Eye, Suffolk, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Glanvilleが約1045年にフランスで生まれた時，父Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanvilleは26歳，母De Thwengは27歳であった。約1065年にイギリススフォルクでFlandrina de Suffolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1086年にイギリススフォルクエイで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph de Glanville(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 De Thweng(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1065년 영국 수폴크에서 Flandrina de Suffolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1086년 영국 수폴크 예에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bawdsey, Suffolk, England: Bawdsey, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph de Glanville nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em França, seu pai, Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, De Thweng, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Flandrina de Suffolk aproximadamente 1065, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1086, em Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph de Glanville родился около 1045 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали De Thweng, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Flandrina de Suffolk около 1065 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности эи, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulph de Glanville nació aproximadamente 1045, en Francia, su papá, Rainald de Glanville Sire de Glanville, tenía 26 años y su mamá, De Thweng, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Flandrina de Suffolk aproximadamente 1065, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1086, en Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
